0:
By the Twelve... I thought Ishgard remarkable, but this...
We are certainly not in Eorzea anymore.

By the Twelve... I thought Ishgard remarkable, but this...

1:
Hee hee hee! A tavern is a tavern, Alphinaud, here or anywhere else!
Now, if you'll excuse me, it's time to do what I do best!

Hee hee hee! A tavern is a tavern, Alphinaud, here or anywhere else!
Now, if you'll excuse me, it's time to do what I do best!

10:
I beg your pardon!?
If you are trying to win my trust, you are failing quite spectacularly.

I beg your pardon!?
If you are trying to win my trust, you are failing quite spectacularly.

15:
Now, there's the young diplomat I was told to expect! Very well, then,
I shall explain. You understand that you are come to a most reclusive and secretive nation, yes? One whose borders are closed to foreign trade save at this single port?

Now, there's the young diplomat I was told to expect! Very well, then,
I shall explain. You understand that you are come to a most reclusive and secretive nation, yes? One whose borders are closed to foreign trade save at this single port?

20:
I still have my doubts, but he may have a point.
I say we accept his invitation─for now.

I still have my doubts, but he may have a point.
I say we accept his invitation─for now.

22:
You may avail yourselves of these offices for the duration of your visit.
Come and go as you like, and know that you may speak freely here.

You may avail yourselves of these offices for the duration of your visit.
Come and go as you like, and know that you may speak freely here.

40:
Bowing to this pressure, Hingashi severed ties with these toll-takers and forbade the payment of the Ruby Tithe, prompting the Confederacy to make
it known that any merchants choosing to sail the Ruby Sea would do so
at their peril...

it known that any merchants choosing to sail the Ruby Sea would do so
at their peril...

47:
Endless and most sincere apologies to you and yours, yes, yes.
This way, this way. Quickly now!

Endless and most sincere apologies to you and yours, yes, yes.
This way, this way. Quickly now!

49:
The ship, the ship... So very sorry to inform you, yes, yes.
Long before was it pledged to another.

The ship, the ship... So very sorry to inform you, yes, yes.
Long before was it pledged to another.

62:
(-Curious Kojin-)All is well. The Sekiseigumi will not return this way for some time,
I should think.

63:
(-Curious Kojin-)You are of the East Aldenard Trading Company, yes? Come with me.
I know a safer way.

(-Curious Kojin-)You are of the East Aldenard Trading Company, yes? Come with me.
I know a safer way.

71:
I chanced to witness your meeting with Hancock at the tavern,
and saw an opportunity.

I chanced to witness your meeting with Hancock at the tavern,
and saw an opportunity.

73:
Like many, I came to Kugane as a trader to make my fortune.
Kojin of the Red may serve the Empire as mercenaries, but Kojin of the Blue walk a different path.

Like many, I came to Kugane as a trader to make my fortune.
Kojin of the Red may serve the Empire as mercenaries, but Kojin of the Blue walk a different path.

75:
So I seek the custom of those less predisposed to dismiss us outright.
Namely, the East Aldenard Trading Company.

So I seek the custom of those less predisposed to dismiss us outright.
Namely, the East Aldenard Trading Company.

79:
Ah, yes─you sought passage across the Ruby Sea, did you not?
I have a ship you can use.

Ah, yes─you sought passage across the Ruby Sea, did you not?

91:
Hmm... It would seem there has been a misunderstanding.
Allow me to explain...

93:
Ten bouts for my freedom, aye!
'Tis but a pity you came too late to witness the last one.

Ten bouts for my freedom, aye!
'Tis but a pity you came too late to witness the last one.

97:
Ah. And we had just concluded negotiations.
I gather my assistance was not required?

Ah. And we had just concluded negotiations.

99:
A shimmering sea of rubies, stretching from horizon to horizon.
You could almost believe it went on forever...

A shimmering sea of rubies, stretching from horizon to horizon.
You could almost believe it went on forever...

100:
But beyond that red expanse lay a land in turmoil.
On the shores of Othard, our Doman brothers struggled in vain...
